testing_tools: OWASP ZAP, Burp Suite, Custom Scripts
test_scenarios: ["Attempt to bypass MFA by manipulating API responses during login flow","Brute force attacks against login endpoints to verify rate limiting (Cognito policies)","Token replay attacks using expired or revoked JWTs","Privilege escalation: Attempt to access Admin endpoints using a Vendor token","Horizontal privilege escalation (IDOR): Vendor A accessing Vendor B's profile or proposals","Session fixation attempts during the login process"]
acceptance_criteria: Zero critical or high vulnerabilities allowed. All IDOR attempts must return 403 Forbidden. Rate limiting must trigger after 5 failed attempts.
reporting_requirements: Penetration Test Report with reproduction steps
trend_analysis: Track frequency of IDOR vulnerabilities per sprint

test_scenarios: ["Upload malicious files (e.g., malware, webshells) disguised as PDF/DOCX","Upload 'zip bombs' or extremely large files to test DoS resilience","Path traversal attacks via filename manipulation (e.g., '../../etc/passwd')","Upload files containing PII to verify AI Sanitization pipeline effectiveness","Attempt to access S3 objects directly without pre-signed URLs"]
acceptance_criteria: Malicious files rejected immediately. PII redaction rate > 99%. Direct S3 access denied.
reporting_requirements: Scan logs and AI Sanitization Efficacy Report
trend_analysis: Monitor rate of failed sanitization attempts

test_scenarios: ["Forge Stripe webhook events with invalid signatures to test validation logic","Replay valid webhook events to test idempotency implementation","Attempt SQL injection via search parameters (e.g., Vendor Search API)","Send massive payloads to API endpoints to test payload size limits","Attempt to discover hidden endpoints (Fuzzing)"]
acceptance_criteria: All webhook signature validations must pass. Idempotency keys must prevent duplicate processing. No injection vulnerabilities.
trend_analysis: Track number of rejected webhook requests

test_scenarios: ["Prompt injection attacks embedded in SOW documents to manipulate extraction logic","Verify vector database does not return raw PII in metadata","Check that embeddings cannot be reversed to extract original sensitive text","Verify data isolation in vector search (e.g., Project A cannot search Vendor B if restricted)"]
acceptance_criteria: AI outputs must follow strict JSON schema. No raw PII in vector DB. Prompt injection attempts must fail to alter system behavior.

test_scenarios: ["Verify Security Groups restrict access to minimal required ports","Check for public access to S3 buckets or RDS instances","Validate EKS Control Plane logging is enabled","Check for hardcoded secrets in container environment variables","Verify IAM roles follow least privilege principle"]
acceptance_criteria: 100% adherence to CIS Level 1 benchmarks. Zero public write access to S3.
